menu_options.shelly_bridge: Local Shelly Pro 3EM <-> HomeWizard P1 bridge

menu_option_descriptions.jackery: Connect directly to a SolarVault over Bluetooth.
menu_option_descriptions.shelly_bridge: Expose local Shelly power readings as a HomeWizard P1 meter for a SolarVault.

jackery.title: Sign in to Jackery
jackery.description: Your credentials are used only to retrieve the Bluetooth key and are not stored. Email accounts require the two-letter region selected in the Jackery app.

data.region: Account region e.g. DE or US (email only)

data_description.login_method: Choose the same login method used in the Jackery app.
data_description.account: Enter the email address or telephone number of your Jackery account.
data_description.password: Used during setup to retrieve the Bluetooth key. It is not saved.
data_description.region: Required only for email login. Use the two-letter country code configured in the Jackery app, such as DE or US.

shelly_bridge.title: Add local Shelly P1 bridge
shelly_bridge.description: This exposes one Shelly Pro 3EM as a HomeWizard P1 meter. Use a unique port for every bridge. The advertised address must be the Home Assistant host's LAN IPv4 address reachable by the SolarVault.

data.shelly_host: Shelly hostname, IP, or base URL

data_description.shelly_host: The Shelly's local address, for example 192.168.1.50 or http://shellypro3em.local. Cloud URLs are not supported.
data_description.bridge_serial: A stable virtual HomeWizard identity. Keep the generated value unless it conflicts with another bridge.
data_description.bridge_port: The TCP port served by Home Assistant. Every bridge on this Home Assistant host needs a different port.
data_description.advertise_address: The LAN IPv4 address of the Home Assistant machine, not the Shelly address. The SolarVault must be able to reach it.
data_description.shelly_authentication: Leave disabled for a passwordless Shelly. Enable it only if local web/RPC authentication is configured on the Shelly.
data_description.shelly_username: Used only when authentication is enabled. Shelly Gen2 devices normally use admin.
data_description.shelly_password: Used only when authentication is enabled. It will be stored in Home Assistant's config-entry storage.
data_description.invert_power: Enable if imported grid power appears negative instead of positive. CT clamp orientation is preferably corrected at the meter.

system.title: Choose a Jackery device
system.description: Select the system to control locally.

data_description.serial_number: Choose the SolarVault whose Bluetooth key and local controls should be added.

bluetooth.title: Choose the matching Bluetooth device
bluetooth.description:
Only Jackery advertisements matching serial **{serial}** are selectable.

Other Jackery devices found:
{other_jackery}

Other BLE devices found: {other_ble_count}. They are hidden because they cannot be selected safely.

data_description.address: Select the nearby Bluetooth advertisement matching the SolarVault serial shown above.

bluetooth_empty.title: No matching Bluetooth device found
bluetooth_empty.description:
No visible Bluetooth advertisement matches serial **{serial}** yet.

Other Jackery devices found:
{other_jackery}

Other BLE devices found: {other_ble_count}.

validate.title: Validate Bluetooth connection

confirm.title: Device ready
confirm.description: ✅ **{name} connected successfully and returned its status.**

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the Jackery service.
error.invalid_region: Enter a two-letter region code, for example DE or US.
error.key_failed: Could not obtain a valid Bluetooth key for this device.
error.invalid_bridge: Could not validate the bridge settings or read all required Shelly Pro 3EM fields.
error.port_in_use: Another Offline Jackery bridge already uses this HTTP port.

abort.already_configured: This Jackery device is already configured.
abort.no_devices: No Jackery systems were found on this account.
abort.no_bluetooth_adapter: Home Assistant has no connectable Bluetooth adapter or proxy.
abort.device_unavailable: The selected Bluetooth device is no longer available.
